title: Pridge
description: A formatter for the Shrimple/Prawn Academy Hypixel Guild bridge
body:
# Pridge
Pridge is a cosmetic 1.21.10/11 mod that allows customizing the guild chat having in mind the Shrimple/Prawn Academy guilds bridges to allow for better interpretation of the messages.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/324c13262d3d46ab0a6a82be5480f976347cfdd4.png)
